nasb.text: The women sang as they played, and said, “Saul has slain his thousands, And David his ten thousands.”

esv.text: And the women sang to one another as they celebrated, “Saul has struck down his thousands, and David his ten thousands.”

cnv.text: 婦女們跳舞、歌唱，說： “掃羅殺死千千！ 大衛殺死萬萬！”

ccb.text: 她们跳舞歌唱：“扫罗杀死千千，大卫杀死万万。”
